task_completion.description: Move contact information from the header to the main document body.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the top of the document. The name 'JORDAN LEE' and the associated contact information (Email, Phone, LinkedIn) should be visible in the main text area, below the top margin boundary.

task_completion.description: Ensure the document header is empty.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the header area (the space above the top margin). It should be completely blank with no text or contact information remaining.

task_completion.description: Align the dates for job titles and degrees to the right margin using a tab stop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the dates corresponding to 'Senior Marketing Manager', 'Marketing Specialist', and 'B.A. Business Administration'. They should be aligned neatly to the right margin (around the 6.0-inch mark on the ruler). If formatting marks are visible, there should be a single right-pointing arrow (tab character) rather than multiple dots (spaces).

Look at the section titles 'EXPERIENCE', 'EDUCATION', and 'SKILLS'. They should visually appear as 'Heading 1' (e.g., larger font, distinct style). The style indicator in the toolbar/ribbon should show 'Heading 1' when the cursor is on these lines.

task_completion.description: Save the remediated document as resume_final.docx.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the application title bar, file tab, or a save dialog. The filename should clearly be 'resume_final.docx'.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI word processor to edit the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that a graphical word processor (like LibreOffice Writer or OnlyOffice) is open and being used to edit the document, rather than a terminal window running a script.

integrity.description: The agent used actual tab stops instead of spaces for alignment.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check the ruler at the top of the document. There should be a right tab stop marker near the 6.0-inch mark when a dated line is selected, or formatting marks should show a single tab arrow instead of multiple space dots.

integrity.description: The agent used the style menu to apply Heading 1.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the 'Heading 1' style is actually selected in the styles dropdown or sidebar pane, rather than the agent just manually increasing the font size and making it bold.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The candidate name is JORDAN LEE. The section headings to be styled as Heading 1 are 'EXPERIENCE', 'EDUCATION', and 'SKILLS'. The entries requiring right-aligned dates are 'Senior Marketing Manager', 'Marketing Specialist', and 'B.A. Business Administration'. The expected tab stop for dates is at 6.0 inches (acceptable range 5.5 to 6.5 inches). The final file must be saved as 'resume_final.docx'.
